summary: Made one surgical exit-seam adjustment to better hand off into chapter 11's remembered pre-dawn warmth while preserving chapter 10's existing opening, scene beats, and tonal pressure.
edits: Added a brief pre-dawn shoulder-and-laugh beat after the ledger warning so chapter 11's noon reflection has on-page support.
Left the opening structure intact because it already hands off cleanly from chapter 9 and remains distinct from the object-led chapter 11 opening.
Verified no style-bible example_lines appear verbatim in the chapter.
